title: rubus fairholmianus
intro: Rubus fairholmianus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Fairholm's Bramble, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus fairholmianus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus fairholmianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent disease.
